title: FEC Canvas Completion
learningObjectives: Complete FEC blocks 4-6 (Capture Value, Enable Value, Unified Venture Proposition)
Understand revenue models and cost structures for advisory practices
Identify key resources and partners needed to deliver value
Synthesize FEC into a cohesive business model
facilitatorPrep: Review each rookie's Week 2 FEC progress
Prepare examples of revenue models for advisory practices
Set up squad peer review stations
Queue canvas wizard demo for the session
